description: For a new website, a marketer needs to set up conversion tracking to measure form submissions.

nodes.task_description: Create a new 'thank you' page that users are redirected to after submitting the form.
Create a new 'destination' goal in Google Analytics that tracks views of the 'thank you' page.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sets up the goal in Google Analytics.

nodes.task_description: Import the new goal into Google Ads to enable conversion tracking for ad campaigns.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully links Google Analytics and Google Ads for conversion tracking.
